purpose: Operator command palette and terminal input corridor with allowlist enforcement.
truth_rules: Only backend allowlisted commands are executable.
Unknown command attempts must produce explicit BLOCK feedback.
accessibility_rules: Keyboard operation is mandatory for command input and buttons.
proof_requirements: Allowlist command sequence evidence in actions.py.
Action history entries include status and source.
change_safety: Command UI changes must preserve backend safety policy and stop conditions.
